comparison.title: Feature comparison
comparison.subtitle: Detailed breakdown of features across all plans

features.title: What's included in each plan
features.subtitle: Plans differ in AI depth, proxy coverage, and evaluation quotas. Scale resources as your business grows.

items.title: AI landing page diagnostics
items.description: Professional and Elite plans include 12-dimension AI analysis to predict offer performance and provide actionable budget recommendations.

items.title: Global proxy IP access
items.description: Test offers from real user perspectives across different markets. Starter supports US only, Professional covers 10+ regions, Elite provides 50+ countries.

items.title: Real click simulation
items.description: All plans include real click simulation to verify tracking pixels and test landing page hotspots.

items.title: Ad account sync
items.description: Connect Google Ads, Meta, TikTok and more. Sync performance data and get anomaly alerts.

items.question: What's included during the trial?
items.answer: New users get a 7-day free trial with access to AI evaluations and the ad collaboration hub. No credit card required.

items.question: How are tokens billed?
items.answer: Basic evaluations consume 1 token, while AI smart evaluations (12-dimension analysis) use 3 tokens. Each plan includes a monthly token allowance.

items.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan anytime?
items.answer: Yes. Upgrades take effect immediately. Downgrades apply at the end of your current billing cycle. Annual billing offers 50% savings (buy 6 months, get 6 months free).

items.question: What is 'Real click simulation'?
items.answer: Real click simulation mimics authentic user click behavior to help you test landing page hotspots and verify that tracking pixels are working correctly.

items.question: Which regions are supported by global proxy IPs?
items.answer: Starter plan supports US proxy IP only. Professional plan covers 10+ major markets (US, UK, Germany, France, Japan, Australia, etc.). Elite plan provides access to 50+ countries worldwide.

items.question: How many ad accounts can I connect?
items.answer: Starter allows up to 3 accounts, Professional up to 10, and Elite supports unlimited ad accounts.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and corporate wire transfers. Contact sales for custom payment arrangements.

items.question: Is there enterprise pricing?
items.answer: Yes. Enterprise plans include custom token packages, private deployment, SSO integration, and dedicated support. Contact our sales team for a tailored proposal.

hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.description: AdsAI is committed to protecting the security and privacy of customer data. The following terms apply to all teams using AdsAI products.

sections.title: Data Collection and Use
content: We collect account registration information, ad account authorization data, and landing page evaluation data solely to provide AdsAI services.
We do not sell customer data or use it for unauthorized commercial purposes.

sections.title: Data Storage and Security
content: Critical data is stored on Google Cloud and Supabase, using Row-Level Security (RLS) to ensure tenant isolation.
Sensitive credentials and access keys are managed through GCP Secret Manager, with regular access log audits.

sections.title: Customer Data Rights
content: Customers can export or delete their data at any time. Requests will be processed within 72 hours.
For Data Processing Agreement (DPA) signing, please contact privacy@adsai.dev.

hero.description: Comprehensive guides, strategy templates, and support channels to help teams quickly build AI-driven advertising workflows.

hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.description: AdsAI is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information. Last updated: October 2025

sections.title: 1. Information Collection
content: Account Information: Email, name, and company details provided during registration
Usage Data: Operation records, evaluation history, and API call logs on the platform
Advertising Account Data: Ad account information obtained through OAuth authorization (used only for product features)
Device Information: IP address, browser type, operating system (for security protection)
Cookie Data: Used to maintain login status and improve user experience

sections.title: 2. Information Usage
content: Provide Core Services: Landing page evaluation, AI analysis, ad campaign management
Improve Product Experience: Analyze usage patterns to optimize features and performance
Account Security: Detect abnormal behavior and prevent fraud and abuse
Customer Support: Respond to your questions and requests
Legal Compliance: Comply with relevant laws, regulations, and regulatory requirements
Marketing Communications: Send product updates and feature introductions (you can unsubscribe anytime)

sections.title: 3. Data Sharing
content: We will not sell your personal information
Third-Party Service Providers: Share only when necessary (e.g., payment processing, cloud storage), all bound by confidentiality agreements
Legal Requirements: Disclose when required by law, regulations, or judicial proceedings
Business Transfers: Data may be transferred with the business in mergers, acquisitions, etc. (advance notice will be given)
Anonymous Statistics: May share anonymous, aggregated statistical data for industry research

sections.title: 4. Data Security
content: Encrypted Transmission: All data transmitted via HTTPS/TLS encryption
Access Control: Strict authentication and permission management system
Data Encryption: Sensitive information encrypted in the database
Regular Audits: Regular security audits and vulnerability scans
Employee Training: All employees sign confidentiality agreements and receive security training
Backup and Recovery: Regular data backups to prevent catastrophic loss

sections.title: 5. Your Rights
content: Access Right: View your personal information we've collected
Correction Right: Update or modify inaccurate information
Deletion Right: Request deletion of your personal information (subject to legal requirements)
Export Right: Export your data in a structured format
Objection Right: Object to our processing of your personal information for specific purposes
Withdraw Consent: Withdraw previously granted consent (does not affect processing before withdrawal)

sections.title: 6. Cookie Policy
content: Necessary Cookies: Maintain login status and ensure security (cannot be disabled)
Functional Cookies: Remember your preference settings
Analytics Cookies: Help us understand usage and improve products (can be disabled in settings)
Marketing Cookies: Used for personalized advertising (can be disabled in settings)
Third-Party Cookies: From integrated services (e.g., Google Analytics), manageable through browser settings

sections.title: 7. Data Retention
content: Active Accounts: Retain data during account existence
Deleted Accounts: Completely clear personal information within 30 days after deletion
Legal Requirements: Some data may be retained longer due to legal requirements
Anonymization: Some data may be used for long-term research after anonymization

sections.title: 8. Minors' Privacy
content: Our services are for business users and not targeted at minors under 18
If we discover we've collected information from minors, we will delete it immediately
Parents or guardians can contact us to delete minors' information

sections.title: 9. Policy Updates
content: We may update this policy from time to time to reflect legal changes or business practices
Significant changes will be notified 30 days in advance via email or site notification
Continued use of services indicates acceptance of the updated policy
Historical versions can be viewed at the bottom of this page

sections.title: 10. Contact Us
content: Privacy questions or requests: privacy@adsai.dev
Data Protection Officer: dpo@adsai.dev
Response time: We will respond to your request within 30 days

hero.title: Terms of Service
hero.description: Please read these Terms of Service carefully before using AdsAI services. Using our services indicates your agreement to these terms. Last updated: October 2025

sections.title: 1. Service Description
clauses: AdsAI provides AI-based landing page evaluation, ad account management, and campaign coordination services
Services include but are not limited to: Offer evaluation, real-time bidding analysis, multi-platform account integration, budget optimization recommendations
We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or terminate part or all of the services at any time
Service content and features may vary depending on your chosen plan
Beta features may be unstable, and we make no guarantees about their availability

sections.title: 2. Account Registration and Use
clauses: You must be at least 18 years old and have full civil capacity
Information provided during registration must be true, accurate, and complete
You are fully responsible for account security and confidentiality
Sharing account credentials or allowing unauthorized access is prohibited
You must notify us immediately if you discover account theft or security vulnerabilities
One entity is allowed only one account (unless with our written permission)

sections.title: 3. Payment and Subscription
clauses: Fees are charged based on selected plan and billing cycle (monthly/annual)
All prices exclude taxes; taxes are your responsibility
Payment methods include credit card, Alipay, WeChat Pay, etc. (varies by region)
Subscriptions auto-renew; you can cancel anytime in account settings
After cancellation, service continues until the end of the current billing cycle
Refund policy: Full refund during free trial period, prorated refund for unused portion after trial
Overdue payments will result in service suspension; accounts will be deleted after 30 days

sections.title: 4. Usage Restrictions
clauses: Prohibited for any illegal purposes or activities violating local laws
Prohibited from posting false, misleading, or rights-infringing content
Prohibited from attacking, interfering with, or damaging our servers and networks
Prohibited from using automated tools (e.g., bots, crawlers) to access services (except API)
Prohibited from reverse engineering, decompiling, or attempting to extract our source code
Prohibited from reselling, renting, or otherwise commercializing our services
Violations will result in immediate account termination without refund

sections.title: 5. Intellectual Property
clauses: AdsAI services and all content (code, design, algorithms, documentation, etc.) are owned by us
You retain ownership of uploaded data but grant us a license to use it to provide services
You agree we may use anonymous, aggregated data to improve services and conduct research
You may not copy, modify, or distribute any of our content without written permission
AdsAI trademarks, logos, and brand elements are our property and may not be used without permission

sections.title: 6. Data and Privacy
clauses: We process your personal information according to our Privacy Policy
You authorize us to access third-party advertising platform (e.g., Google Ads, Meta Ads) account data
We do not access or store your advertising platform account passwords
You are responsible for content uploaded to the platform and must ensure it doesn't infringe others' rights
We take reasonable measures to protect data security but cannot guarantee absolute security
Data breaches or security incidents will be reported promptly as required by law

sections.title: 7. Service Availability and Support
clauses: We strive to provide 99.9% service uptime (excluding planned maintenance)
Planned maintenance will be notified 24 hours in advance; emergency maintenance may occur without warning
Support channels include email, online chat, ticket system (depending on plan)
Response times: Starter 48 hours, Professional 24 hours, Elite 4 hours
We are not responsible for third-party service (e.g., advertising platform API) interruptions

sections.title: 8. Disclaimer
clauses: Services are provided "as is" without any express or implied warranties
We do not guarantee services are completely error-free, uninterrupted, or meet all your needs
AI evaluation results are for reference only; actual campaign performance may vary due to multiple factors
You assume all risks for any campaign decisions based on the services
We are not responsible for ad account bans, campaign losses, or third-party platform policy changes
To the maximum extent permitted by law, we exclude all liability

sections.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
clauses: We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages
Liability limitations apply even if we have been advised of the possibility of such damages
Our total liability does not exceed the fees you paid in the past 12 months
Some jurisdictions do not allow exclusion or limitation of liability; these limitations may not apply to you
You agree to indemnify us for any losses we suffer due to your breach of these terms

sections.title: 10. Service Termination
clauses: You may cancel your subscription at any time through account settings
We may suspend or terminate your account for any reason (including breach of terms)
Upon termination, you will lose access to services and data
You can export data within 30 days before termination
Some terms (e.g., intellectual property, disclaimers) remain in effect after termination

sections.title: 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution
clauses: These terms are governed by the laws of [your jurisdiction]
Any disputes arising from these terms should first be resolved through friendly negotiation
If negotiation fails, submit to [designated arbitration institution] for arbitration
Arbitration decisions are final and binding on both parties
You agree to waive the right to participate in class action lawsuits

sections.title: 12. Terms Changes
clauses: We may update these terms from time to time to reflect legal or business changes
Significant changes will be notified 30 days in advance via email or site notification
Continued use of services indicates acceptance of updated terms
If you disagree with changes, you may terminate services before they take effect and request a refund (prorated)
Historical versions can be viewed at the bottom of this page

sections.title: 13. Miscellaneous
clauses: These terms constitute the entire agreement between you and AdsAI
If any part of these terms is deemed invalid, the remaining parts remain valid
Our failure to exercise any right does not constitute a waiver of that right
You may not assign rights under these terms without our written consent
In case of conflicts between Chinese and English versions, the Chinese version prevails

sections.title: 14. Contact Us
clauses: Legal and compliance: legal@adsai.dev
Account and subscription: billing@adsai.dev
Technical support: support@adsai.dev
General inquiries: hello@adsai.dev
Response time: 1-2 business days

hero.title: Key Features
hero.description: AdsAI provides a complete landing page evaluation and ad campaign coordination solution, helping you make data-driven campaign decisions.

blocks.title: AI-Powered Evaluation - 12-Dimension Deep Analysis
blocks.description: AdsAI' AI engine analyzes landing pages across 12 key dimensions, including content quality, user experience, technical performance, and conversion optimization, generating comprehensive scores and detailed recommendations.
highlights: Content Dimensions: Headline appeal, value proposition clarity, social proof credibility
Experience Dimensions: Page load speed, mobile responsiveness, navigation smoothness
Conversion Dimensions: CTA clarity, form optimization, trust element completeness
Technical Dimensions: SEO friendliness, security checks, code quality
Generate professional evaluation reports in 1 minute, 120x efficiency boost
Each evaluation costs only 1-3 tokens, extremely cost-effective

blocks.title: Real Click Simulation - Mimicking Real User Behavior
blocks.description: Use real browser environments and user behavior patterns to visit landing pages, bypass anti-fraud detection, and obtain authentic page load data and conversion funnel experience.
highlights: Real Browser Environment: Randomly switch between Chrome/Firefox/Safari
Random User Agents: Simulate different device and system combinations
Natural Behavior Patterns: Page scrolling, mouse movements, dwell time simulation
Cookie and Fingerprint Management: Avoid being identified as bots
JavaScript Rendering Support: Capture complete SPA single-page application content
Bypass Cloudflare, DataDome and other anti-fraud systems

blocks.title: Global Proxy IP - 50+ Region Coverage
blocks.description: Use residential proxy IPs from over 50 countries and regions worldwide to simulate user access from different locations, test geo-targeted ad performance and landing page localization.
highlights: 50+ Country/Region Coverage: North America, Europe, Asia-Pacific, Latin America fully covered
Residential IP Quality: Real user IPs, not easily identified as proxies
Starter Plan: US proxy IP only
Professional Plan: Supports 10+ core regions
Elite Plan: Supports all 50+ regions
Automatic IP Rotation: Use different IPs for each request to avoid bans

blocks.title: Multi-Platform Account Management
blocks.description: One-stop integration with mainstream advertising platforms like Google Ads, Meta Ads (Facebook/Instagram), TikTok Ads, managing multiple accounts and campaigns centrally.
highlights: OAuth Secure Authorization: No account password required
Multi-Account Support: Manage dozens of ad accounts simultaneously
Real-Time Data Sync: Campaigns, budgets, performance data auto-update
Cross-Platform Comparison: Compare campaign performance across platforms at a glance
Batch Operations: Pause/enable multiple campaigns with one click
Permission Management: Tiered access control for team members

blocks.title: Intelligent Budget Allocation
blocks.description: Based on AI evaluation results and historical campaign data, automatically recommend optimal budget allocation plans to maximize ROI.
highlights: Smart Recommendations: Provide budget suggestions based on Offer scores and expected conversion rates
Dynamic Adjustment: Real-time monitoring of campaign performance, automatic budget reallocation
A/B Testing Support: Test multiple landing pages simultaneously, intelligently distribute traffic
Risk Control: Set daily/total budget caps to avoid overspending
Historical Analysis: Review past campaign data to optimize future decisions
Campaign Calendar: Plan long-term campaign strategies with visualized budget allocation

blocks.title: Real-Time Monitoring & Alerts
blocks.description: 24/7 monitoring of ad accounts and landing page status, immediate notifications for anomalies to avoid budget waste and missed opportunities.
highlights: Landing Page Availability Monitoring: Regular checks for normal page access
Ad Account Status Monitoring: Detect account bans, limit anomalies, and other issues
Budget Consumption Alerts: Advance notifications when approaching budget caps
Performance Anomaly Alerts: Instant reminders for conversion rate drops or CPA spikes
Multi-Channel Notifications: Email, Webhook, Slack, WeChat, etc.
Custom Alert Rules: Set alert thresholds based on business needs

hero.title: About Us
hero.subtitle: AdsAI leverages AI and automation to help affiliate marketers and growth teams improve advertising efficiency and ROI.

mission.paragraph1: We understand the core challenges of affiliate marketing: how to quickly identify high-value opportunities among countless offers, how to efficiently test landing page conversion, and how to coordinate budget allocation across multiple ad platforms. These repetitive, time-consuming tasks are exactly what AdsAI is built to solve.
mission.paragraph2: Through AI-powered offer evaluation, global proxy IP testing, cross-channel campaign coordination, and other core features, we help users transform from experience-driven to data-driven decision making, from manual operations to automated workflows, freeing up more time to focus on strategy and creativity.
mission.paragraph3: The AdsAI team consists of engineers from Google and Meta advertising platforms, as well as seasoned affiliate marketing practitioners. We believe that the deep integration of technology and industry experience is key to building products that truly solve real problems.

values.title: Efficiency First
values.description: We believe automation and AI can free marketers from repetitive labor, allowing them to focus on more valuable strategic decisions and creative work.

values.title: Data-Driven
values.description: All campaign decisions should be based on real data and AI insights, not subjective guesses. We provide transparent, traceable evaluation reports to help users make informed choices.

values.title: Continuous Innovation
values.description: Ad technology and market environments change rapidly. We continuously iterate product features to ensure users always have the most advanced tools to tackle challenges.

values.title: Customer Success
values.description: Our success is built on customer success. Whether individual marketers or enterprise teams, we are committed to helping them maximize ROI.

hero.title: Security & Compliance
hero.description: We are committed to protecting your data security and ensuring our platform meets international security standards and compliance requirements.

sections.title: Data Security
details: All data transmission uses TLS 1.3 encryption
Sensitive information stored with AES-256 encryption
Regular security audits and penetration testing
Multi-layer firewall and intrusion detection systems

sections.title: Privacy Protection
details: We do not sell or share your personal information
Strict data access control and authorization management
Support data export and deletion requests
Full compliance with GDPR and CCPA privacy regulations

sections.title: Access Control
details: Multi-factor authentication (MFA) support
Role-based access control (RBAC)
Complete operation logs and audit trails
IP whitelisting and geographic access restrictions

sections.title: Infrastructure Security
details: Hosted on Google Cloud Platform with 99.9% SLA
Automated backups with disaster recovery capabilities
DDoS protection and traffic anomaly detection
Regular security updates and vulnerability patching

sections.title: Compliance Certification
details: SOC 2 Type II certification (in progress)
GDPR compliant data processing
PCI DSS compliant payment processing
Regular third-party security assessments
